permit_types.name: Building Permit
permit_types.description: Required for new construction, additions, and major alterations to structures
permit_types.estimated_timeline: 4-12 weeks for plan review, varies by complexity

permit_types.name: Combination Building Permit
permit_types.description: Combines building, electrical, mechanical, and plumbing permits into one
permit_types.fees: Combined fees based on project valuation

permit_types.name: Electrical Permit
permit_types.description: Required for electrical installations, modifications, or repairs
permit_types.estimated_timeline: 1-2 weeks for no-plan, 4-6 weeks with plans

permit_types.name: Mechanical Permit
permit_types.description: Required for HVAC installations, ductwork, and mechanical systems
permit_types.estimated_timeline: 1-2 weeks for like-for-like, 4-6 weeks for new installations
permit_types.fees: Based on equipment type and BTU rating

permit_types.name: Plumbing Permit
permit_types.description: Required for plumbing installations, water heaters, and sewer connections
permit_types.estimated_timeline: 1-2 weeks for simple, 4-6 weeks for complex

permit_types.name: No-Plan Residential MEP
permit_types.description: Simplified permit for residential mechanical, electrical, or plumbing work that doesn't require plan submittal

permit_types.name: Photovoltaic / Solar Permit
permit_types.description: Required for residential and commercial solar panel installations

permit_types.name: Accessory Dwelling Unit (ADU) Permit
permit_types.description: Permit for building an accessory dwelling unit on residential property
permit_types.estimated_timeline: 60 days max for plan review (per state law)
permit_types.fees: Based on square footage and valuation, impact fees waived for ADUs under 750 sq ft
process: Final inspection and certificate of occupancy
permit_types.special_notes: California AB 2221 and SB 897 streamline ADU approvals. No owner-occupancy requirement. Setback requirements reduced to 4 feet for detached ADUs.

permit_types.name: Demolition Permit
permit_types.description: Required for partial or complete demolition of structures

permit_types.name: Grading Permit
permit_types.description: Required for earth-moving, excavation, or fill operations
permit_types.fees: Based on cubic yards of earth moved

permit_types.name: Fence/Wall Permit
permit_types.description: Required for fences and walls exceeding height limits

permit_types.name: Traffic Control Permit
permit_types.description: Required for work that affects public right-of-way or traffic flow

permit_types.name: Sign Permit
permit_types.description: Required for commercial signs, including wall signs, monument signs, and temporary signs

processing_options.name: Rapid Review
processing_options.description: Expedited plan review for qualifying residential projects

processing_options.name: Express Plan Check
processing_options.description: Faster plan review for commercial tenant improvements

DS-345.name: Application for Building Permit
DS-345.description: Standard permit application form for all building-related permits

DS-560.name: Plan Submittal Requirements
DS-560.description: Checklist of required plan sheets and details for plan review

DS-16.name: Owner-Builder Declaration
DS-16.description: Required when property owner acts as their own general contractor

DS-530.name: ADU Supplemental Application
DS-530.description: Additional information required for Accessory Dwelling Unit permits

DS-165.name: Grading Plan Requirements
DS-165.description: Requirements checklist for grading permit applications

DS-4107.name: Inspection Request Form
DS-4107.description: Form to schedule inspections during and after construction
